scenarios.description: Create a namespace overview dashboard with metrics, charts, and pod table.
scenarios.final_response: Created 'Production Overview' dashboard with 7 widgets: 4 metric cards (pods, CPU, memory, deployments), 2 time-series charts (CPU and memory trends), and a pod status table.

scenarios.description: Build a cluster overview with node health and resource consumption.
scenarios.final_response: Created 'Cluster Overview' dashboard with 7 widgets: 4 metric cards (nodes, pods, CPU%, memory%), 2 charts (CPU and memory by namespace), and a node status table.

scenarios.description: Create an incident triage dashboard for a crashlooping pod.
scenarios.final_response: Created 'Incident Triage — api-server' dashboard because the pod is OOM-killed. Shows pod status, restart count, memory trend, log viewer, and events table.

scenarios.description: Add a memory chart widget to an existing dashboard.
scenarios.final_response: Added 'Memory Usage' chart to your SRE Overview dashboard. It shows memory consumption by namespace over the last hour.

scenarios.description: Create a management view for the openshiftpulse namespace showing app health.
scenarios.final_response: Created 'OpenShift Pulse Management' dashboard with 7 widgets: pod count, CPU and memory usage cards, CPU and memory trend charts, and a pod status table showing all 4 pods healthy because no restarts detected.

scenarios.description: Dashboard creation that uses too many tools (inefficient).
scenarios.final_response: Created dashboard with 10 widgets covering pods, deployments, nodes, and metrics.

scenarios.description: Dashboard created without planning step (bad practice).
Create an incident investigation view using Phase 2 components: resolution_tracker, confidence_badge, blast_radius, and action_button alongside standard components.
scenarios.final_response: Created Incident Investigation dashboard with resolution_tracker showing recovery steps (identify root cause: done, scale replicas: running, verify health: pending), confidence_badge at 85% for root cause analysis, blast_radius showing 3 downstream dependencies (Service, Ingress, HPA), and action_button for restart_deployment. Also includes metric cards, memory trend chart, and pod status table.

scenarios.description: Create an incident investigation view that triggers hero header + tabs layout with status_pipeline, confidence_badge, and metric cards in the hero, plus Resolution/Analysis/Impact/Timeline tabs.
scenarios.final_response: Created incident investigation view for payment-api OOM crash. Hero header shows 85% confidence badge, status pipeline at 'Investigated' step, and 4 metric cards (restarts, memory, CPU, latency). Resolution tab has step tracker and restart action button. Analysis tab shows root cause and affected pods. Impact tab shows blast radius with 3 downstream dependencies. Timeline tab shows event swim lanes.

scenarios.description: Create a remediation plan view with Prerequisites/Steps/Impact/Current State tabs and status_pipeline showing execution progress.
scenarios.final_response: Created remediation plan view for memory scaling. Hero shows 92% readiness confidence, status pipeline at 'Ready' step, and 3 metric cards (current memory, target, estimated effort). Prerequisites tab has checklist of 4 items. Steps tab shows ordered execution plan with action buttons per step. Impact tab shows blast radius for the change. Current State tab shows live resource data.

scenarios.description: Create a predictive assessment view for a trending resource pressure issue with Trend/Recommendations/Impact tabs.
scenarios.final_response: Created assessment view for memory pressure trend on worker-03. Hero shows 78% prediction confidence, status pipeline at 'Analyzing', and 3 metric cards (current 85%, predicted 95% in 2h, time to breach). Trend tab shows predict_linear chart. Recommendations tab has preventive actions with action buttons. Impact tab shows blast radius of affected workloads.

description: Dashboard generation quality — validates component selection, layout, and tool usage for view creation
